conflict: Dan's complicity in something he cannot evaluate — his signature authorizes unknown actions
consequence: Dan's moral comfort is gone; he is an active participant, not a passive victim; the proxy role's passivity is revealed as a form of action
must_land_beats: The facility rendered in specific sensory detail: the hum, the scale, the other proxies signing in parallel
Dan's attempt to read what he's signing — the document is impenetrable but the act of signing is irrevocable
The drive home through New Jersey's industrial landscape — oil refineries, dark sky, the physical world reasserting itself
The realization: compliance is not neutrality; his body makes things legal
pressure_source: Dan's complicity in something he cannot evaluate — his signature authorizes unknown actions
state_shift: Dan's moral comfort is gone; he is an active participant, not a passive victim; the proxy role's passivity is revealed as a form of action
